stories.headline: Trump says 'there won't be anything left' of Iran if it does not quickly agree to a deal with the US
stories.summary: Trump says time is running out for Iran to enter into a nuclear deal with the United States to secure a permanent cessation to hostilities, as the risk of a renewed US-Israel war on Tehran amplifies in the region.

stories.headline: Israel launches strikes on southern Lebanon despite extending ‘ceasefire’
stories.summary: Al Jazeera’s Obaida Hitto reports from Tyre in southern Lebanon on the latest Israeli strikes in the region.

stories.headline: Iran war live: Trump threatens Tehran; Saudi, UAE report drone attacks
stories.summary: Peace talks remain deadlocked as drones hit sites in Saudi Arabia and the UAE.

stories.headline: US Says China to Buy $17 Billion in Farm Goods Annually
stories.summary: China has agreed to buy at least $17 billion of agricultural products annually through 2028, the US said after Donald Trump and Xi Jinping held a major summit in Beijing last week. Bloomberg's Stephen Engle has the details. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: US and Iran Far From Deal as Bond Rout Continues
stories.summary: The US and Iran remain far apart on a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with President Donald Trump expressing frustration with Tehran. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace reports from Dubai. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Xi Jinping prepares to welcome Vladimir Putin to China, four days after hosting Donald Trump
stories.summary: China’s deep relationship with Russia remains a continuing cause for concern in the west, particularly since Moscow launched its invasion of UkraineXi Jinping and Vladimir Putin exchanged “congratulatory letters” on Sunday ahead of the Russian president’s visit to Beijing this week, four days since Donald Trump left China after a high-stakes summit.Xi, China’s leader, said bilateral cooperation between Russia and China had “continuously deepened

stories.headline: 'Everest Man' and 'Mountain Queen' break own records scaling world's tallest peak
stories.summary: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.

stories.headline: Zelostech To Expand in Southeast Asia, Middle East
stories.summary: Sean Zhang, Co-founder, COO & CEO of Global Business of Zelostech, says the company will continue investing in autonomous driving technology while expanding across Southeast Asia and the Middle East. He says this global growth strategy is why the unicorn chose Singapore as its headquarters. He speaks with Yvonne Man and Avril Hong on the sidelines of the BNP Paribas Global EV and Mobility Conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Keppel’s $1 Billion Sale of Telco M1 to Tuas Faces Collapse
stories.summary: Keppel Ltd.’s planned S$1.4 billion ($1.1 billion) sale of one of Singapore’s major telecommunication providers M1 Ltd. is set to collapse after the local regulator suspended its assessment of the deal.

stories.headline: Two Malaysian ex-ministers quit ruling party, posing challenge to Anwar
Sara Duterte trial, Takaichi-Lee summit, Samsung unionists go on strike
The Italianisation of Britain’s finances
stories.summary: Investors have watched the UK’s political flip-flopping and budgetary shortfalls with alarm

stories.headline: Germany goes from labour shortages to hiring freezes
stories.summary: Once one of the Eurozone’s strongest jobs markets, the number of unemployed has topped 3mn for the first time in 15 years

stories.headline: Robotphoenix Chairman on HK Debut, Path to Profitability
stories.summary: Robotphoenix Intelligent Technology Chairman Sai Zhang shares insights on the company’s debut on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, a major milestone for one of China’s leading industrial robotics firms. Zhang also discusses its path to profitability amid elevated investor expectations. He speaks with Yvonne Man and Avril Hong on Bloomberg's The China Show. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Vulcan Energy's Wedin on Business Strategy, Lithium
stories.summary: Francis Wedin, Executive Chair at Vulcan Energy Resources, discusses the company's business strategy and the impact from the price swings in the lithium market. He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts from the sidelines of the BNP Paribas Global Electric Vehicle and Mobility Conference in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Carlyle Japan Expects Two BOJ Rate Hikes This Year
stories.summary: Takaomi Tomioka, Co-Head and Partner at Carlyle Japan, discusses the investment opportunities in the private equity market and sees the Bank of Japan raising interest rates by 25 basis points twice this year. He speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: NTT Finance Postpones Planned Yen Bond to Early June or Later
stories.summary: NTT Finance has postponed a planned yen-denominated corporate bond sale until early June or later amid a surge in Japanese government bond yields.

stories.headline: JGB Yields Outpace Topix Dividend Yield by Most Since 2007
stories.summary: Japan’s 10-year government bond yield has risen well above the country’s dividend yields, raising prospects of rotation out from stocks into bonds once volatility in the bond market subsides.

stories.headline: Evergrande Liquidators Seek $8.4 Billion From PwC in Hong Kong Court
stories.summary: China Evergrande’s liquidators are seeking 57 billion yuan ($8.4 billion) in their lawsuit against PricewaterhouseCoopers International Ltd. and its mainland China and Hong Kong affiliates, among the largest corporate claims ever sought in the city.

stories.headline: Yuan Platform Entices Absa as Africa’s Trade With China Thrives
stories.summary: Absa Group Ltd. is weighing joining a payments platform that facilitates direct settlement in Chinese currency, to take advantage of growing trade with Africa’s biggest trading partner.

stories.headline: Eager for Arms Deal, Taiwan Stresses Need for U.S. Support
stories.summary: After President Trump hinted that weapons sales to Taiwan could figure in negotiations with China, officials emphasized their island’s strategic importance.

stories.headline: One of Ukraine's largest drone attacks kills 3 in Moscow area, Russia says
stories.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy confirms the attack in a post on X, writing that "Ukrainian long-range sanctions reached the Moscow region."

stories.headline: GOP senator who voted to convict Trump in impeachment trial loses primary
stories.summary: Sen. Bill Cassidy of Louisiana failed to make the runoff in his GOP Senate primary five years after his vote to convict Donald Trump, which led the president to call for his ouster.

stories.headline: Drone strike sparks fire near UAE nuclear plant amid Iran ceasefire tension
stories.summary: A drone strike sparked a fire near the UAE’s Barakah nuclear plant, officials say, with no injuries or radiation leak reported as regional tensions around the Iran ceasefire escalate.

stories.headline: ‘Won’t be anything left’: Trump issues threat to Iran amid stalled talks
stories.summary: The US president has pressured Iran to concede to demands including dismantling nuclear programme and missile stocks.

stories.headline: Israel kills at least five in Lebanon after ‘ceasefire’ extended
stories.summary: At least five people have been killed in Israeli air attacks on several locations in southern and eastern Lebanon.

stories.headline: Israel kills three Palestinians in strike on an aid kitchen in Gaza
stories.summary: Israel bombed a kitchen that provided meals to the displaced in Gaza, killing three and injuring others.

stories.headline: UAE reports strike near Abu Dhabi nuclear power plant
stories.summary: The country is investigating the source of the strike, which it calls a "dangerous escalation".

stories.headline: Cassidy Loses Senate Primary in Louisiana, as Trump Vanquishes G.O.P. Foe
stories.summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, a two-term Republican who voted to convict President Trump in his 2021 impeachment trial,  took a veiled swipe at Mr. Trump, saying power should not focus on “one individual.”

stories.headline: World Urban Forum opens in Baku with warning on global housing divide
stories.summary: Ministers and experts opened the World Urban Forum in Baku on Sunday with stark warnings about the global housing divide, calling for international cooperation to tackle a growing crisis.

stories.headline: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
stories.summary: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

stories.headline: Trump-backed challenger defeats Republican senator who voted to convict president
stories.summary: Trump threw his full support behind Julia Letlow in Louisiana's high-stakes contest, branding the incumbent "disloyal".

stories.headline: Inside the 'kill-zone' on Ukraine's front line, where new weapons have transformed war
stories.summary: Machines are increasingly replacing humans on the front line, but troops are still vital for defending territory.

stories.headline: Trump Administration Pushes Narrative of Christian Nation at Prayer Rally in D.C.
stories.summary: The day-long prayer event featured speakers from President Trump’s cabinet and a program that drew connections between the nation’s founding and Christianity.

stories.headline: Lamar Alexander Wants Republicans to Stand Up to Trump
stories.summary: In a new memoir, the former senator, governor and cabinet member says President Trump committed an impeachable offense on Jan. 6 and calls on Congress to assert its power.

stories.headline: ‘Feels like an illusion’: inside post-Maduro Venezuela’s bewildering new era
stories.summary: Four months after Trump’s surprise raid, a political thaw has descended – but mingled with hope is trepidation for what comes nextWhen Ángel Linares heard a strange buzz followed by an explosion, his first thought was that neighbours were setting off fireworks to celebrate the new year.Then his windows shattered, the building’s walls shook and its facade was ripped off, sending him flying on to the ground of an apartment suddenly reduced to rubbl

stories.headline: US college graduates face harsh job market amid economic uncertainty
stories.summary: Gov't funding cuts, war, tariffs and AI advancements intensify competition among recent graduates seeking stable jobs.

stories.headline: Von der Leyen lauds 'dynamic new era' in EU-India relations as Modi visits Sweden
stories.summary: During the second leg of Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's European tour, he visited Sweden's Gothenburg to meet his Swedish counterpart Ulf Kristersson, European Commission Chief Ursula von der Leyen, as well as European and Indian business leaders.

stories.headline: Vox becomes kingmaker as Sánchez suffers defeat in Spanish regional election

stories.headline: Lebanon says six killed in Israeli strike as US announces ceasefire extension
stories.summary: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.

stories.headline: Trump’s China summit shows toll of a difficult year for the president
stories.summary: A year ago, Trump promised a new era during the first major foreign trip of his second term. On his recent visit to Beijing, the war with Iran and economic strain clouded his diplomacy.

stories.headline: At least eight people killed in Bangkok rail crossing collision
stories.summary: Thai authorities say 32 others injured near Makkasan station after freight train strikes bus and fire breaks out At least eight people were killed and 32 others were injured in Thailand after a freight train struck a bus at a rail crossing in Bangkok, rescue officials and a deputy transport minister said.Firefighters and rescue crews were dispatched as flames engulfed the bus and nearby vehicles close to the airport rail link’s Makkasan station,

stories.headline: Freight train and bus crash kills at least eight in Bangkok

stories.headline: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
stories.summary: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

stories.headline: Trump says 20-year nuclear programme suspension by Iran would be enough
stories.summary: The US president says Tehran has to show "real" commitment to removing nuclear fuel and stopping uranium enrichment.

stories.headline: Prisoner swap goes ahead as Kyiv mourns 24 killed in Russian strike on flats

stories.headline: Watch: What did we learn from Trump's visit to China?

stories.headline: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
stories.summary: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.

stories.headline: New York Times defends journalist after Israel threatens to sue
stories.summary: Israel's prime minister says he has ordered legal action over an article which alleged Israeli security officials raped Palestinian detainees.

stories.headline: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but few deals confirmed
stories.summary: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.

stories.headline: Former China hawk elected Solomon Islands' leader
stories.summary: Vote comes a week after lawmakers ousted the nation's former pro-China prime minister.

stories.headline: Xi takes Trump on tour of Communist Party's seat of power in Beijing
stories.summary: Trump and Xi toured Zhongnanhai, the heavily guarded compound where China's top leaders live and work.

stories.headline: War criminal Ratko Mladić's jail release request denied
stories.summary: A UN judge admits the 84-year-old is "in the final stages of his life", but says prison conditions in The Hague ensure his maximum comfort.

stories.headline: Hezbollah support endures in south Lebanon as ceasefire fails to stop war with Israel
stories.summary: Despite continuing Israeli attacks and occupation, many people in the south still believe the armed group is the only force capable of defending them.

stories.headline: Climbers clear path to Everest summit past giant chunk of ice
stories.summary: Nearly 1,000 climbers will attempt to scale the peak in coming weeks and this has raised safety concerns.

stories.headline: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
stories.summary: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.

stories.headline: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'

stories.headline: Pakistan struck a rehab centre and killed 269 Afghans. Their families want to know why
stories.summary: There are calls to investigate the 16 March airstrike - which the UN says likely killed more - as a war crime.

stories.headline: Trump ally Kari Lake tapped to be US ambassador to Jamaica
stories.summary: Lake thanked President Trump for nominating her, saying on social media that Jamaica "is a country I know very well, full of incredible people".

stories.headline: Australia has some of the world's costliest homes. Will scrapping tax breaks help?
stories.summary: The government hopes reforms will help young people enter the market, while critics say it will stifle supply.

stories.headline: Advocaat, 78, set for World Cup record after Curacao return
stories.summary: Dick Advocaat makes a surprise return as Curacao's head coach after his successor Fred Rutten resigned just a month out from their World Cup debut.

stories.headline: 'Total lack of respect': Macron interrupts speaker to ask for silence
stories.summary: The French president stood up during a conference in Kenya to tell the audience to quieten down, saying it was “impossible” for speakers to be heard.
